content:
# Recommendations — iter-017 plan

## Closest-to-completion (prioritize)
1. **SNAP `tensorObjAssoc_eq_localizedAssociator_hK_lhs` (L2142) — ONE mechanical recipe tail from closing.** Head `tensorObjAssoc_hK_lhs_head` is closed and the iter-015 interchange-merge wall is defeated (both committed cold-green). Remaining tail (recipe `analogies/snap-assoc-expose.md`): re-split the merged factor → `Localization.Monoidal.associator_naturality c_A c_B c_C` → `associator_hom_app` → μ-cancel on the `▷ L'C♭` slot → `rw [tensorObjAssoc_hK_lhs_head]`; tail already = `K`. **Each tail step MUST use the slice/have-isolation + `erw` idiom** (full-goal rw/erw whnf-bombs the μ-motive). Last attempt got within one `Category.id_comp`/`assoc` of closing but bombed at the boundary — isolate the cleanup too, or build the re-split via `conv` entering the single `⊗ₘ`. Closing this completes the assembly `tensorObjAssoc_eq_localizedAssociator`, unblocking the `tensorPowAdd` cascade. **Prover lane, NOT analogist** — the algebra is fully validated; this is mechanical application of an established idiom.
2. **FBC crux `pullback_spec_tilde_iso_ring_square_natural` (L1447)** — now that the foundation is sorry-free, this is the live FBC frontier. Route = conjugate-mate re-route via the EXISTING Mathlib trio `iterated_mateEquiv_conjugateEquiv` / `conjugateEquiv_mateEquiv_vcomp` / `mateEquiv_conjugateEquiv_vcomp` (`Adjunction.Mates`, v4.30). HAZARD: `mateEquiv` is `TwoSquare`-valued (recover NatTrans via `.natTrans`/`equivNatTrans`; whiskerings are TwoSquare pasting, NOT `Functor.whiskerLeft`). **DO NOT retry the `homEquiv.injective` hand-peel** (confirmed dead end, strands a unit-prefixed equality, in-place at L1447). This is a substantial standalone effort; consider an effort-breaker decomposition before a prover lane. Typed-sorry remains acceptable.

## Coverage debt (planner: blueprint these)
- **`AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules.sheafification_map_unit_comp_counitIso_hom`** (SNAP L1885, NEW private lemma, unmatched in dag). Statement: sheafified adjunction triangle `L'(η_P) ≫ c_{L'P} = 𝟙`. Proof: `simp only [sheafificationCounitIso]; exact (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction _).left_triangle_components P`. Uses `Adjunction.left_triangle_components`, `sheafificationCounitIso`. Add `\label`+`\lean`+`\uses` block to `Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex`.
- ~70 `RelativeTensorCoequalizer.*` / `W_*` SNAP impl helpers remain unmatched — DEFERRED to the SNAP file-split refactor (documented since iter-008). Not actionable per-iter.

## Hygiene debt (MEDIUM — accumulating; consider a dedicated cleanup pass)
Auditor iter016 flagged extensive stale scaffolding. None blocks proving, but it obscures current state:
- **Stale parent-project iter-NNN labels** (these predate this subproject's archon numbering): FBC L184–246 (`STATUS (iter-234)`/`UPDATE (iter-236)`), L564–590 (`iter-240 PIVOT`/`iter-241`), L1063 (`iter-011`); SNAP L674–690 (`iter-063`), L1203–1237 (`closed iter-053/066/078`), L1261–1307 (`iter-066`). Best handled by a `refactor` comment-cleanup lane (provers shouldn't burn budget on it).
- **Misscoped `maxHeartbeats`** FBC L1511 (`set_option … in` before a `/-! -/` doc-comment → consumed on no-op) + L1546–1549 (4 stacked, only innermost 1600000 effective). On the COMPILE-DEAD mate region — fold into the queued **mate-excision refactor**, do NOT touch with a prover.
- **Empty Seam section headers** FBC L1521–1558 + **stale cross-ref** L1688 (cites `…@~1999`, file is 1900 lines) — same mate-excision lane.
- **59-line superseded commented-out recipe** SNAP L2280–2338 (`Retained reference … superseded by the hK_lhs/hK_rhs split`) — delete in the cleanup pass; it's in git history.
- Stale in-proof labels on now-closed/active proofs: SNAP L1983–1996 (`BLOCKER (iter-015)`/`FIX for iter-016` above the now-successful close), L2073–2115 (`iter-014 COLD-PROBE`); FBC L785–807 (`iter-015 MORPHISM-LEVEL`). Trim to concise inline remarks.
- `import Mathlib` (FBC L6) → specific imports (compile-time; LOW).

## Do NOT retry (blocked / dead ends)
- FBC `homEquiv.injective` hand-peel on the crux L1447 — strands unit-prefixed equality, no finisher.
- SNAP head/merge μ-cancel via `rw [Iso.hom_inv_id_assoc]` or full-goal `rw`/`erw`/`simp` of the triangle — pattern-not-found / whnf-bomb. MUST be `erw` + slice/have isolation.
- SNAP: do NOT re-sign `assocCommonForm` (risks the green `hK_rhs`); the iter-016 pinning was confined to the hK_lhs-side statements per the plan GUARD.
- FBC `base_change_mate_*` apparatus (L1694 etc.) — compile-dead riders, dedicated mate-excision iter only.

## Reusable patterns discovered (also in PROJECT_STATUS KB)
- **FBC morphism-level identity-bridge close:** when `F.map (iso.inv.app N)` over a category-instance junction must reduce to `𝟙`, rewrite the inner morphism to `eqToHom rfl` via `hom_ext` + per-open rfl-lemma, then term-mode `Category.comp_id` (NOT `rw [Functor.map_id]` — junction blocks the syntactic match).
- **SNAP dual-instance μ-cancel:** the localized↔X.Modules comp-boundary μ-cancel/merge fires via `erw` ONLY when isolated (slice/have, local motive — never the full goal). Statement-level `(C := MonoidalPresheaf X)` pinning aligns object-args but the residual still needs `erw` + isolation. Root cause is the dual `MonoidalCategory` instance, not a hidden witness.

## Strategic note (next-next iter)
- The **durable dual-`MonoidalCategory`-instance removal** (delete `pshModMonoidal` bare instance, keep `MonoidalPresheaf X` synonym) is QUEUED (plan iter-016 reversal signal). Once the assembly tail lands via pinning, evaluate whether the cascade coherences (`tensorPowAdd_*`) each need per-statement pinning or whether the durable instance-removal refactor is cheaper than pinning 5 more lemmas. If the cascade hits the same μ-wall repeatedly, fire the refactor BEFORE proving them.
